name: MEP Pipes & Ducts - FALLBACK (Generic positioning only)
description: FALLBACK rule for pipes/ducts not matched by discipline-specific rules. Provides positioning only, no tag format.
_deprecationNote: This is a catch-all fallback. Prefer discipline-specific rules: sanitary_*.json, hvac_*.json, heating_*.json, refrigeration_*.json, cable_trays.json

tagFormat._comment: No specific format - uses Revit default tag. For proper tagging use discipline-specific rules.
tagFormat.fallbackBehavior: Use element's default tag family and show System Abbreviation + Size

_comments.note: Linear elements - tags thường đặt centered trên đường ống/kênh
_comments.warning: This rule has no tagFormat defined. It only provides positioning. Use discipline-specific rules for proper tagging.
